spec.title: Safe redaction and error boundary contract

humanSummary.text: Final re-audit found no P0/P1 findings after report redaction and golden preflight repairs. The remaining promotion race is non-blocking and is already covered by KAIFUU-074.

findings.title: Patch promotion still uses exists-then-rename no-clobber behavior
findings.description: The patch promotion helper still checks whether the output exists before renaming the staging directory, which leaves a possible race with concurrent output creation on platforms whose rename semantics may clobber or otherwise differ.

evidence.detail: Re-audit confirmed the remaining issue is covered by the planned KAIFUU-074 no-clobber promotion hardening node.
cargo test -p kaifuu-cli passed with existing promotion failure coverage.

findings.impact: A concurrent writer could make patch promotion behavior less deterministic until KAIFUU-074 replaces exists-then-rename with a stricter no-clobber promotion boundary.
actionableAcceptanceCriteria: KAIFUU-074 hardens both delta apply and patch staging promotion against exists-then-rename races.
KAIFUU-074 includes concurrent output-path tests for the CLI patch promotion path.

acceptanceCriteria: CLI patch promotion never replaces an existing output path after preflight through an exists-then-rename race
Concurrent output-path tests cover both delta apply and patch staging promotion paths
auditFocus: Delta apply and patch command parity
existingDagNodeUpdate.notes: KAIFUU-074 already covers the no-clobber promotion class; this audit appends the patch-command path explicitly.
